name: Alcohol Removed Sparkling Rose
description: The great house of Freixenet have been perfecting this wine for around about a decade. The current version is convincingly wine-like. The colour is very attractive pale pink with persistent bubbles. On the nose there are mainly wild berries such as raspberry and strawberry, along with floral notes and tropical fruits. On the palate it is especially fruity, fresh and pleasant. It fills the mouth, expressing the good quality of its raw material. The very well balanced acidity and the medium size bubbles produce a very refreshing mouth feel.

name: Draught 0.0 Can 440mL
description: To create Guinness 0.0, the St James’s Gate brewers start by brewing Guinness exactly as they always have, using the same natural ingredients - water, barley, hops, and yeast - before gently removing the alcohol through a special cold filtration method. Cold filtration protects the integrity of the beer's taste and character. The brewers then carefully blend and balance the flavours to ensure the distinctive flavour profile and taste characteristics of Guinness.

name: Non Alcoholic Italian Orange 700mL
description: La Dolce Vita in every sip. This spirit captures the essence of a vibrantly red Italian bitter aperitivo-style with flavours that are distinct, crisp and contemporary. To Taste: Rich mouthful of flavors with blood orange and red citrus taking the lead. Maraschino brings balance, adding to the generosity on the mid-palate, giving length of flavor followed by a persistent, pithy dryness. Bouquet: Citrus, blood orange and classic notes of orange pith to create complexity.

name: Zero Bottle 330mL
description: Heineken master brewers started from zero and spent years exploring, brewing, and tasting before they finally created a recipe defined by its refreshing fruity notes and soft malty body - perfectly balanced. One that deserves the Heineken mark. Of course, with the uncompromising Heineken characteristics since 1873: made with top ingredients and Heineken’s unique A-Yeast. It wasn’t easy, but not impossible.

name: Half Day Hazy Pale Ale Cans 375mL
description: The Half Day Hazy, perfect for every occasion. Be it an extended holiday sesh with your pals or feet up in your favourite solo spot, this fruity hazy pale ale lets your heart escape while still letting you wrap up a hard day’s work.Whether you've got a half day off or a half day left, our tropical sunshine in a can will take you halfway to a holiday. Pairs well with yummy stuff and holds up before, during or after a few normal ones. Knock-off without the knock-ons, go to your happy place and take a half day on us. You've earned it.

name: Everything Except Prosecco
description: Tread Softly is a certified sustainable and naturally lighter in alcohol wine brand, committed to reducing its carbon footprint by planting a tree for every case sold. Since 2019, over 3 million trees (and counting) have been planted in the ‘Tread Softly Forest’. A bright, light and effervescent version of Prosecco made with zero alcohol meaning you get all the fizz without the fuzz. This is crisp with citrus flavours and finishes with cleansing acidity.

name: Finger Lime Sauvignon Blanc
description: The perfect blend of premium de-alcoholised Sauvignon Blanc and Native Australian Finger Lime. Bright aroma of white nectarine and fresh cucumber. A crisp, lingering finish underpinned with herbaceous notes

name: Italian Spritz 700mL
description: A spritz that has us talking with our hands. This unique aperitif captures the essence of a vibrant orange Italian spritz-style drink, with flavours that are the perfect balance of bitter and contemporary. To Taste: The bittersweet flavour of the Italian Spritz is like sunshine itself, bright with flavours typical of its origins. The sweetness from orange is perfectly fused with the complex and astringent flavours of rhubarb, finishing dry and deliciously refreshing. Bouquet: A rich and unique mix of aromas including rhubarb, bitter orange, lifted with herbal edges and soft bitterness to create balance. Classic orange-red in colour.

name: 1 Salted Raspberry & Chamomile
description: Redefine the wine occasion, using the natural world with multidisciplinary techniques, to produce the future of drinks. Tannin, fruit, salinity & acidity is extracted from real food to solve the problem for the empty non-alcoholic wine glass.

name: Birell Ultra Light Bottles 375mL
description: Coopers Birell has all great flavours of you favourite Coopers beer but with one important difference, virtually no alcohol. A quite vibrant rich colour with mouth-filling maltiness all capped off with a cleansing palate. Using premium malted barley, hops and yeast, this is a great way to enjoy a quality beer without any of the alcohol.

name: Chardonnay
description: You've got to know the rules, to know where to break them. Our team brings together traditional winemaking techniques with cutting edge triple distillation, to redefine what's possible and forge a new path in winemaking. The result? Your favourite full flavoured wine, with everything but the alcohol. Pale straw in appearance, with a vibrant bouquet of citrus blossom and honeysuckle. The palate is fresh, crisp and balanced.

name: Yeah Buoy Non Alcoholic XPA Can 330mL
description: Low in alcohol but not in flavour, Yeah Buoy is a beer you can enjoy any time, anywhere.This refreshing XPA is packed with juicy tropical aromas of papaya, peach and apricot. Medium bodied and moreish you’ll be saying ‘Yeah Buoy!’ to another. Stay amongst it!

name: Zero Bottles 330mL
description: With deep golden hues and a fruity aroma that carries through to the palate. Great Northern Zero has a balanced sweetness that is complemented with subtle bitterness. It finishes clean and crisp.

name: Blood Orange Aperitif 0% 750mL
description: Classic Italian-style bitter with a dominant blood orange citrus note, supported by aan infusion of natural botanicals and a medley of spice elements. Most importantly, a unique addition of African Wormwood for bitterness.&amp;nbsp; A mouth-watering, bittersweet mouthfeel.

name: Zero Percent Sparkling Rose
description: A delightfully refreshing and sparkling non-alcoholic drink, bursting with vibrant notes of fresh strawberries. Finely balanced, it finishes with a complex, dry twist that’s sure to captivate your taste buds. Perfect for those moments when you want all the flavor without the alcohol. This No Alcohol Sparkling Rose blends European premium grapes with green tea from Yunnan, China. The tea is meticulously hand-plucked and brewed into a strong infusion, enhancing the grape ferment. This process results in a complex, finely balanced Rose with added mouthfeel and dried tannins, all without generating any alcohol. At just 22 calories per 100ml, it offers a delicious, lighter alternative to traditional sparkling wines.

name: Zero Rose
description: This wine has had the alcohol gently removed and remains full of flavour. Lifted sweet berry fruit aromas with hints of strawberry, followed by soft layers of red fruit flavours.

name: Dr Lo Alcohol-Removed Riesling NV
description: The Loosen family has been growing Riesling and producing wine in the Mosel valley for over 200 years. The current owner, Ernst “Erni” Loosen, assumed ownership in 1988, embarking on a quest to greatly improve the quality and international reputation of the estate, the Mosel region, and Riesling in general. Today, Erni is one of the most iconic and influential winemakers in the world.

name: Nearly Naked 0% Alcohol Sparkling NV
description: Grapes from our award-winning Adelaide Hills vineyard are crushed and fermented at our winery in Nairne. We carefully remove the alcohol, ensuring the fresh aromas, vibrant flavours and chalky mouthful remain. Orange blossom, red apple and gooseberry aromas intertwine with crisp flavours of lemon peel, brioche and pink grapefruit. Beautifully balanced with a bright, bubbly mid-plate and lively, lingering finish. The first 100% Adelaide Hills, super-premium ‘NO-LO’ sparkling wine, proudly made by Sidewood Estate. Wine…… stripped bare.

name: Zero Alc Sparkling NV
description: Pale straw colour with a fine and persistent bead. The nose brings a light, lemony aroma with subtle tropical notes. The palate is finely structured with a fresh, crisp finish.

name: Zero Alcohol XPA Cans 375mL
description: Hey Days represents ‘chilling’ kinds of occasions with great friends that never end. Say Hey like you mean it and let the good times roll with this zero-alcohol XPA. This fresh and crisp XPA is bursting with flavour and goes down with a taste like a bright golden sun. This XPA exhibits looks slightly hazy with a light malt aroma with a dash of pine, citrus, and slight tropical hop notes on the nose while the palate is light malt body with, citrus, pine and slight tropical fruit flavours. Medium hop bitterness lingers to create a deliciously rounded mouthfeel. Produced by or on behalf of Pinnacle Drinks, part of Endeavour Group Limited.

name: Zero Alc Sauvignon Blanc
description: Pale straw colour with a hint of green. <br>A mix of light passionfruit and tropical aromas.<br>A fresh lively palate with pleasingly clean aftertaste.

name: Everything Except Zero Alcohol Shiraz
description: Tread Softly is a certified sustainable and naturally lighter in alcohol wine brand, committed to reducing its carbon footprint by planting a tree for every case sold. Since 2019, over 3 million trees (and counting) have been planted in the ‘Tread Softly Forest’. This lighter bodied Shiraz shows real restraint yet is enormously flavoursome. Nicely rounded with soft tannins and persistent intensity make this a genuine crowd pleaser.

name: Zero Alc Grenache
description: Like the paradox of life, an infinite mystery, this wine is like no other. Seemingly bold, yet irresistibly delicate, this grenache has had the alcohol gently removed and remains full of flavour. Delicate raspberry and red plum aromas, with delicious red fruit and sweet spice flavours.

name: Gin Alternative 700mL
description: Shaken, stirred or however you prefer - Lyre’s Gin Alternative captures the essence of a classic London Dry Gin, with flavours that are plentiful, bright and contemporary. To Taste:Firm flavors with juniper and citrus. Earthy notes fill the mid-palate which has lovely vinous qualities. The pepperberry adds warmth and delivers a generous, dry finish. Bouquet:Rich scents of orange blossom, lime, jasmine, juniper and mint.

name: 0% Sparkling Blanc
description: An elegant non-alcoholic Sparkling Blanc with delicate notes of jasmine and a refined finish, offering a sophisticated and refreshing experience for any occasion. Perfectly paired with grilled shrimp with lemon and herbs. Vegan &amp; Vegetarian friendly.
